methodology_note: BD FCT 2013 uses 'available carbohydrates' (net carbs) in the c field. Energy is calculated as 4*p + 4*c + 9*f + 2*fi, not 4*p + 4*c + 9*f. Adding fiber at 2 kcal/g resolves the apparent 30–45%% energy gap for 15 records.

data_errors_need_source.note: Curried Cauliflower soup — p=23.4g implausible; est=443 vs k=130; needs ICMR source row
Spinach soup — p=53.0g impossible; est=918 vs k=164; needs ICMR source row
